params.name: id
params.description: Filter by page IDs. Multiple IDs can be specified as comma-separated values.

params.name: space-id
params.description: Filter by space ID. Multiple IDs can be specified.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by content status.

params.name: title
params.description: Filter by content title. Supports exact match.

params.name: body-format
params.description: The representation format for the content body.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order for results. Prefix with - for descending order. Supported fields include id, title, created-date, and modified-date.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Used for pagination. The cursor value is returned in the response _links.next when there are more results.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return.

items.docs: Returns all pages. The number of results is limited by the limit parameter and additional results can be retrieved via the next cursor. Results can be filtered by space, status, title, and body format.
Creates a page in the space. Pages can be created as a child of another page by specifying the parentId. Pages are created in the current status (draft or current).

params.name: id
params.description: The ID of the content.

params.name: body-format
params.description: The representation format for the content body.

params.name: get-draft
params.description: If true, returns the draft version of the page.

params.name: version
params.description: The version number of the content to retrieve.

items.docs: Returns a specific page. The response includes the page body in the requested format, version information, and links.

params.name: id
params.description: The ID of the content.

items.docs: Updates a page by id. The request body must include the current version number, the new title, the space id, the status, and the body in the specified representation.

params.name: id
params.description: The ID of the content.

params.name: purge
params.description: If true, the page is permanently deleted instead of moved to trash.

items.docs: Deletes a page by id. By default pages are moved to trash. To purge a page permanently, set the purge parameter to true.

params.name: id
params.description: The ID of the content.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Used for pagination. The cursor value is returned in the response _links.next when there are more results.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order for results. Prefix with - for descending order. Supported fields include id, title, created-date, and modified-date.

items.docs: Returns the child pages of a specific page, ordered by position in the page tree.

params.name: id
params.description: The ID of the space.

params.name: depth
params.description: Filter by depth in the page tree. Use root to get only top-level pages.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by content status.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order for results. Prefix with - for descending order. Supported fields include id, title, created-date, and modified-date.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Used for pagination. The cursor value is returned in the response _links.next when there are more results.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return.

items.docs: Returns all pages in a specific space. Supports filtering by status and depth.

params.name: id
params.description: The ID of the content.

params.name: prefix
params.description: Filter labels by prefix (global, my, team).

params.name: cursor
params.description: Used for pagination. The cursor value is returned in the response _links.next when there are more results.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return.

items.docs: Returns the labels associated with a specific page.

params.description: The ID of the label.

items.docs: Returns a specific label by id.

params.name: ids
params.description: Filter by space IDs. Multiple IDs can be specified as comma-separated values.

params.name: keys
params.description: Filter by space keys. Multiple keys can be specified as comma-separated values.

params.name: type
params.description: Filter by space type.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by space status.

params.name: labels
params.description: Filter by space labels. Multiple labels can be specified.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order for results. Prefix with - for descending order. Supported fields include id, title, created-date, and modified-date.

params.name: description-format
params.description: The format of the space description in the response.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Used for pagination. The cursor value is returned in the response _links.next when there are more results.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return.

items.docs: Returns all spaces. The results can be filtered by space type, status, and labels. Pagination is cursor-based.
